summary.text: [2-6] A static top-down shot features fruit kabobs composed of red strawberry tips, white banana slices, green grapes, and marshmallows on a white surface. The centered white text "HOW TO MAKE GRINCH KABOBS" is visible then disappears. [6-8] The fruit arrangement remains static as the text "Let's Get Started" fades into view in the center. [8-10] The text vanishes, and the scene cuts to a top-down view of a sealed plastic package containing thin, light-colored wooden skewers with a cardboard label on a dark grey surface. [10-14] The skewer package remains stationary while the white text "Bamboo sticks (kabob)" appears in the lower-left corner and subsequently disappears.

[14-20] A sealed plastic package containing thin, light-colored wooden skewers rests horizontally on a dark grey surface. The bundle features a cardboard label attached to the left end of the clear wrapping. The object remains completely stationary with consistent lighting and no text overlays.
[20-24] A clear plastic bag filled with green grapes is placed on top of the bamboo skewer package. The bag features a label reading "Columbine Vineyards" near the top right. Simultaneously, white text reading "Green Grapes" appears in the bottom left corner of the dark grey surface.
[24-26] The clear plastic bag filled with green grapes remains stationary on top of the bamboo skewer package. The white text overlay reading "Green Grapes" in the bottom left corner vanishes, leaving the scene showing only the packaged ingredients on the dark grey surface.

[26-34] Three yellow bananas with produce stickers lie clustered on a dark grey countertop, stems pointing left. A container of white marshmallows is partially visible top-left, and a cardboard box edge is on the right. White text "Bananas" appears in the bottom left corner [28-30] then vanishes [30-32]. [158-162] The right hand reaches into the far-left bowl containing white chunks, selects a marshmallow, and threads it onto the top tip of the skewer above the red fruit. [162-164] The hand pushes the white marshmallow down onto the top of the wooden skewer, securing it above the red strawberry slice to complete the fruit stack, creating a festive Grinch-themed kabob held over the workspace.

[166-170] A hand places an assembled skewer featuring a white marshmallow, red strawberry, yellow banana, and green grape onto a red square plate alongside identical fruit kabobs. An arm with a gold bracelet reaches into the top-left white bowl of mini marshmallows to retrieve a piece.
